narrative:
Coventry Twp township has 6,876 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.8 percentage points.
